LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JOEL EPPINETTE'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE OF DEFENDANT JOEL EPPINETTE TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON SEPTEMBER 16, 2010. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-12-2010 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY (CONTINUED) ON OCT-13-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. JONATHAN BORNSTEIN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JOEL EPPINETTE APPEARED AS SELF REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT ORDERED THE PARTIES TO GO TO A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 207 AND REPORT BACK TO DEPT. 206 AT 10:30AM TO REPORT ON THE STATUS. THE MATTER WAS RECALLED AT AROUND 10:40AM AND THE SIGNIFICANT OTHER APPEARED FOR MR. EPPINETTE BECAUSE SHE REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT MR. EPPINETTE HAS LEFT AND CALLED AN AMBULANCE BECAUSE HE WAS NOT FEELING WELL. THE COURT ORDERED PARTIES TO RETURN ON 10/13/10 AT 9:30AM AND FOR THE DEFENDANT OR HIS SIGNIFICANT OTHER TO BRING A DOCTOR'S NOTE WITH SPECIFICITY OF THE MEDICAL CONDITION OF MR. JOEL EPPINETTE AND WHEN HE WILL BE ABLE TO RETURN. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-13-2010 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY (CONTINUED) ON OCT-19-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. JONATHAN BORNSTEIN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JOEL EPPINETTE APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT IS SATISFIED WITH THE DOCTOR'S NOTE PRESENTED BY MR. EPPINETTE. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR FURTHER SETTLEMENT AND MR. EPPINETTE WILL BE GETTING ASSISTANCE WITH THE EVICTION DEFENSE COLLABORATIVE. IF NOT SETTLED THEN PARTIES WILL BE GOING TO TRIAL. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
